nav.info_modal_description: Processing Community Day (PCD) is a worldwide series of community-led events celebrating art, code, and open-source creative tools. Events are organized by local communities around the globe.
nav.info_modal_forum_btn_new_tab: Visit the forum thread (opens in new tab)
nav.submit_modal_step1_body: Let us know you're interested in the organizer thread.
nav.submit_modal_step2_body: Start a thread on the forum for your city/country/location.
nav.submit_modal_step3_body: Fill in the form. We will add your event to the map.
nav.submit_modal_note: No GitHub account? Just say hi in the forum thread and we'll help you from there.
